name: Passover Ladyfingers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg yolks with 1/4 cup of sugar until light and creamy.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating well after each addition until stiff. Fold in the egg whites to the yolk mixture.
3. Sift the cake meal and potato starch on waxed paper. Gently fold these into the batter.
4. Line a large cookie sheet with brown paper. Pipe the batter into finger shapes (approximately 1 inch wide by 4 inches long) using a pastry bag fitted with a round tube. Dust lightly with superfine sugar.
5. Bake for 10-12 minutes in a preheated 375°F oven. Loosen immediately with a spatula and remove from paper.
Makes about 24 ladyfingers. These can be used in desserts, lined in a springform pan for mousse, or served with fruit compote.
